name: Code Verified
description: Source code is verified (review/analysis) for compliance with the low-level requirements and coding standards.
rationale: DO-178C Table A-5: source code is verified for compliance, accuracy, and conformance to standards before integration. Not required at DAL D.

examples.fails: the required objective evidence is absent

source: RTCA DO-178C / EUROCAE ED-12C — Software Considerations in Airborne Systems and Equipment Certification; objectives per Annex A tables A-1 to A-10.
